meta.description: Act 1 social phase hub: Docking Bay 7, a seedy cantina and market on the fringe world of Ord Varee.

sabacc-dealer.name: Kell Tavari
sabacc-dealer.description: A smooth-talking Twi'lek sabacc dealer who knows everyone's business. Information is his real currency.

mechanic.name: Greeska
mechanic.description: A grizzled Ugnaught mechanic who can repair anything, but drives a hard bargain for parts.

rebel-contact.name: Vera Solaris
rebel-contact.description: A cautious human woman running rebel logistics in the sector. She offers missions and supplies, but only to those she trusts.

bounty-hunter.name: Drez Venn
bounty-hunter.description: A Mandalorian bounty hunter between jobs. Might be convinced to lend a hand, for the right price or the right cause.

medic.name: Doc Hessen
medic.description: A former Imperial field medic who deserted after witnessing one too many atrocities. He runs a back-alley clinic.

location.name: Docking Bay 7 Cantina
location.description: A dimly lit cantina adjacent to a run-down docking bay on Ord Varee. Smoke curls from hookah pipes, a jukebox plays jizz-wailer tunes, and every corner holds a deal waiting to happen.
location.narrativeIntro: Your team files into the cantina, blasters still warm from the last job. The barkeep nods -- regulars now. Between the clatter of sabacc cards and the hum of conversation, several faces catch your eye. Time to gather intel, restock, and maybe make some new friends.

encounters.name: Kell's Information Network
encounters.description: Kell Tavari shuffles his sabacc deck and raises an eyebrow as you approach. He always knows more than he lets on.
encounters.narrativeIntro: "Pull up a chair. Cards? Or are you here for something more... valuable?" Kell's lekku twitch with amusement.

dialogueOptions.text: "We're looking for Imperial patrol routes. Help an old friend out?"

successOutcomes.hintText: Imperial patrols rotate every 6 hours. The gap between shifts at the northern corridor is your best window.

successOutcomes.description: Kell throws in some credits from a recent sabacc win.

triumphOutcomes.description: Kell is genuinely impressed. He owes you one.

failureOutcomes.description: Kell swindles you into buying a round of drinks before refusing to help.

outcome.description: Kell puts in a good word with the local vendors.
Word spreads that you're asking too many questions.

dialogueOptions.text: "I heard the Empire's offering a bounty on rebel cells. Figured I'd cash in..."

successOutcomes.hintText: Kell lets slip the location of a hidden weapons cache. He thinks you're going to sell the rebels out, but the info works both ways.
successOutcomes.description: Kell accidentally reveals the weapons cache location.

failureOutcomes.description: Kell sees through the lie and is not amused.

despairOutcomes.description: Kell 'accidentally' bumps into you, lifting your credit chip.

dialogueOptions.text: "Name your price for the patrol routes. Credits talk."

successOutcomes.hintText: Clean transaction. Kell hands over a datapad with Imperial patrol routes and shift changes.
successOutcomes.description: Purchased Imperial patrol data from Kell.

failureOutcomes.description: Kell takes your credits but the data turns out to be outdated.

encounters.name: Vera's Next Assignment
encounters.description: Vera Solaris sits in a quiet booth, sipping caf. She gestures for you to join her.
encounters.narrativeIntro: "Good work at the outpost. The cell needs more from you. Interested?" She slides a holoprojector across the table.

dialogueOptions.text: "We're ready. What does the rebellion need?"

successOutcomes.hintText: Vera briefs you on the intel operation. An Imperial communications array needs to be tapped.
successOutcomes.description: Vera shares the details of the next rebel operation.
Your confident leadership impresses Vera. Gain 3 XP.

failureOutcomes.hintText: Vera shares the briefing, but seems uncertain about your readiness.

outcome.description: Vera secures an operational budget for your team.

dialogueOptions.text: "We'll do it, but we need better gear. Can the cell help?"

successOutcomes.description: Vera authorizes an equipment stipend from rebel funds.

successOutcomes.hintText: You'll get the mission briefing along with the credits.
successOutcomes.description: Mission briefing included with the equipment stipend.

failureOutcomes.description: Vera can only spare a small amount. The rebellion is stretched thin.

encounters.name: The Mandalorian's Price
encounters.description: Drez Venn sits alone, methodically cleaning a blaster. His beskar catches the low cantina light.
encounters.narrativeIntro: The bounty hunter looks up with expressionless visor. "I know who you are. And I know who's hunting you. Question is: do you want me on your side or theirs?"

successOutcomes.description: Drez agrees to join your crew for a reasonable fee.

failureOutcomes.description: Drez takes 50 credits for 'listening to your pitch' and walks away.

dialogueOptions.text: "I know about the bounty on your head from Jabba. Work with us, or we turn you in."

successOutcomes.description: Drez grudgingly agrees to work with you. He won't forget this.

failureOutcomes.description: Drez is furious. He won't forget this slight.

despairOutcomes.description: Drez draws his blaster and demands compensation for the insult.

dialogueOptions.text: "We're fighting the Empire. Mandalore remembers Imperial occupation. Fight for something that matters."

successOutcomes.description: Something shifts behind the visor. "For Mandalore, then. Not for you."

triumphOutcomes.description: Drez respects your appeal to Mandalorian honor.

failureOutcomes.description: "Pretty words. But pretty words don't stop blaster bolts." He turns away.

encounters.name: Doc's Clinic
encounters.description: Doc Hessen's clinic is a converted storage closet with surprisingly clean equipment.
encounters.narrativeIntro: "Another rough job, eh? Let me take a look." Doc adjusts his spectacles and gestures to the exam table.

dialogueOptions.text: "Doc, we could use your help. The rebellion needs people like you."

successOutcomes.description: Doc patches up your wounded team member free of charge.

failureOutcomes.description: Doc helps but charges for the supplies.

outcome.description: Doc gives you a spare medkit.

dialogueOptions.text: "What's the going rate for a full patch-up?"

successOutcomes.description: Doc offers a fair rate. Healing provided.

failureOutcomes.description: Doc charges full price but does good work.

shops.name: Greeska's Parts & Armory
shops.description: Greeska's workshop is cluttered with parts from a dozen different starships. Somewhere in the mess, there's military-grade equipment.

shops.name: Rebel Supply Cache
shops.description: Vera maintains a small stockpile of equipment for rebel operatives.
